description: Returns a list of Inspection Users for a given project

parameters.name: filters[vendor_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Vendor ID.

parameters.name: filters[potential_assignee]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) with the that can be potential inspection assignees.

parameters.name: filters[potential_distribution_member]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) that can be potential distribution members.

parameters.name: filters[potential_point_of_contact]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) with the that can be potential inspection points of contact.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction of sorting param (name) is in desc order of full name

potential_assignee.description: Represents whether or not a user can be an Assignee for an Inspection.

potential_point_of_contact.description: Represents whether or not a user can be a Point of Contact for an Inspection.

potential_distribution_member.description: Represents whether or not a user can be a Distribution Member for an Inspection.

default_distribution_member.description: Represents whether or not a user is a Default Distribution Member for Inspections.

custom_field_%{custom_field_decimal_defi.description: Represents whether or not the user has read access to the Custom Field
